process.commandLine: B=/mnt/kindtest; if cat "$B/visible.txt" 2>/dev/null | grep -q VISIBLE_SECRET; then echo VISIBLE_OK; else echo VISIBLE_MISSING; fi; if [ -c "$B/ghost_file.txt" ]; then echo FILE_IS_DEVNULL_OK; else echo FILE_NOT_DEVNULL_BUG; fi; if [ -s "$B/ghost_file.txt" ]; then echo FILE_NONEMPTY_BUG; else echo FILE_EMPTY_OK; fi; if [ -d "$B/ghost_dir" ]; then echo DIR_IS_DIR_OK; else echo DIR_NOT_DIR_BUG; fi
